title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform has generated over $50 million in payouts to human recruiters by pursuing a human-first hiring model instead of replacing recruiters with AI. The company achieved 10x revenue growth in 2025 working with customers like Palantir and Rippling by focusing on deep problem understanding rather than algorithmic optimization.
